series_metadata.series_description: Corrections to Bureau of Motor Vehicles (BMV) records involving inaccurate crash involvement entries on licensed Ohio drivers records. All corrections made after the initial entry by the BMV will be documented. Also, is accordance with House Bill 990, Section 3937.41 ORC. Law prohibits unfavorable treatment of applicants for or policy holders of private automobile insurance, that were involved in crashes while engaged in official police, fire or rescue work. To avoid having a crash appear on a person''s driver history abstract, a letter certifying that he/she was involved in a crash while on official duty must be sent to ODPS.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for three years, then destroy., Paper: Shred
